## Checklist

- [ ] No real financial data anywhere in this PR (templates only, fake numbers in examples)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] If this adds a skill: SKILL.md has YAML frontmatter, clear `description`, and concrete trigger phrases
- [ ] If this adds a template: file ends in `.template.md` and uses `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` syntax
